mapper.update: MERGE INTO ${targetTable} T USING ( SELECT S1.SOURCE_KEY AS CUSTOMER_ID, TRIM(S1.CUSTOMER_NAME) AS CUSTOMER_NAME, S1.BIRTH_YY || LPAD(S1.BIRTH_MM, 2, '0') || LPAD(S1.BIRTH_DD, 2, '0') AS BIRTHDAY, NVL(S2.AMOUNT, 0) AS AMOUNT FROM ${sourceTable001} S1 LEFT JOIN ${sourceTable002} S2 ON S2.SOURCE_KEY = S1.SOURCE_KEY ) S ON (T.CUSTOMER_ID = S.CUSTOMER_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.CUSTOMER_NAME = S.CUSTOMER_NAME, T.BIRTHDAY = S.BIRTHDAY, T.AMOUNT = S.AMOUNT, T.UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, BIRTHDAY, AMOUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( S.CUSTOMER_ID, S.CUSTOMER_NAME, S.BIRTHDAY, S.AMOUNT, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
